title: Terrified IShowSpeed Covering His Mouth / Speed Scared
about:
Terrified IShowSpeed Covering His Mouth or Speed Scared  refers to a black-and-white reaction image, GIF and video clip of YouTuber and streamer IShowSpeed covering his mouth, seemingly holding back a scream, and bulging his eyes to express terror. It was used en masse within TikTok comment sections in late 2025, largely stemming from its use in the Degloving memes, related to the activity of Gloving, and the Serial Killer IShowSpeed video caption memes.

The image originally comes from a November 2023 IShowSpeed stream. In the clip, Speed uncovers his mouth to quickly say the N-word, and its initial use in video caption memes largely used the soundbite memetically.
origin:
On November 11th, 2023, IShowSpeed went live on YouTube[2] for over five hours while he played video games like Fortnite. The stream was titled, "👨🏿‍🦱🎸⋆⭒˚｡ ⋆," and received over 2.3 million views in two years.

At the stream's 5:24:19 timestamp,[3] Speed is playing the survival horror video game Fears to Fathom – Ironbark Lookout and is hiding under a bed. He's seen with his hands over his mouth, looking terrified. Then, he lets go of his mouth and quickly says the N-word.
